title: Import Large SQL Files on HostGator
description: HostGator phpMyAdmin limits are low. Split the dump for reliable imports.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: Large SQL files often fail on HostGator’s shared hosting limits.
Split into 10–20MB chunks and import one by one.

content.title: Import on HostGator
content.text: Split large dumps into safe chunks.

faq.question: What if the import still fails?
faq.answer: Try smaller chunks or use CLI if SSH is available.
